claims.summary: A stale operator-pending NEXT override must expire instead of deadlocking autonomous action.
claims.disposition: verify max-age expiry, terminal status writing, and protected/read-only base allowlist

claims.summary: RECALL must read continuity state without restoring or mutating runtime state.
claims.disposition: verify RECALL and MEMORY_RECALL routing plus continuity tests

claims.summary: An exhausted, expired, or closed research budget must stop recurring NEXT pressure and permit return to Recess.
claims.disposition: verify terminal budget stages, terminal NEXT suppression, debit accounting, and Recess availability
